---
title: "Prototypes"
---

## Overview

This page showcases our interactive prototypes and dashboards built for the project.

## Prototype v1

*Screenshot or embedded iframe of prototype v1*

![Prototype v1](images/prototype_v1.png)

**Key features:**

- Feature A
- Feature B
- Feature C

[🔗 View Live Prototype](https://your-shiny-app-or-tableau-link.com)

---

## Prototype v2

*Screenshot or embedded iframe of prototype v2*

![Prototype v2](images/prototype_v2.png)

**Improvements from v1:**

- Improvement A
- Improvement B

[🔗 View Live Prototype](https://your-shiny-app-or-tableau-link.com)

---

## Final Dashboard

Embed or link the final interactive dashboard here.

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://your-final-dashboard-link.com" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
```
